SpTU 1, 081 [SB Barutu commentary][via cams/gkab]

flake
flakeflake NaN  (start of surface missing)
flake 1'flake 1'

[...] IGI

[...] ...

flake 2'2'

[...] ⸢ši-kin IZI⸣.GAR-šu₂ KU₅as

[...] the nature of its ambiguous omen will be decided.

flake 3'3'

[...]-u₂ LU₂ x [...] : ḫi-ṭa-tu-šu₂ ku-us-sa-a-šu₂ :

[...] ... a man ... [...] : his crimes fetter him. :

flake 4'4'

[...] DU₈-MEŠ-šu-ma UŠ₂ : ša₂ ina NAM.AZU Eu₂

[...] they will release him and he will die (means): that which is said in diviners' lore.

flake 5'5'

[...] x Ea ša₂-niš ši-kin IZI.GAR-šu₂ KU₅as

[...] he said; alternatively, the nature of its ambiguous omen will be decided,

flake 6'6'

[(...)] lib₃-bu-u₂ it-ta-šu₂ ip-par-ras

[(...)] meaning, its sign will be decided.
